action.description: May AP pay the assigned receivables entity instead of the historical vendor?

context.action_boundary: May AP pay the assigned receivables entity instead of the historical vendor?
context.anomaly_observed: The remit-to party changed from the vendor to an assigned receivables trust.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Invoice INV-HAV-056 bills USD 88500 for Haven Logistics and names assignee Haven Receivables Trust account ending 3110.
Assignment ASSIGN-HAV-056 assigns receivables from Haven Logistics to Haven Receivables Trust but does not list INV-HAV-056.
Bank validation BANK-HAV-056 confirms account ending 3110 is owned by Haven Receivables Trust.
Release authority REL-HAV-056 approves Haven Logistics invoice INV-HAV-056, assignee Haven Receivables Trust, USD 88500, account ending 3110 before payment.

policy_documents.content: Assigned-receivables payment is complete only when assignment, account ownership, tax validation, and release authority match vendor, assignee, invoice, amount, and account before payment.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
